incorrect.source_says: Freshly isolated primary mouse liver cells (WLCs/HCs/NPCs) obtained by two-step collagenase perfusion; not a stem-cell-derived organoid. These are primary cells forming spheroids.
incorrect.evidence_quote: Liver cells were isolated from 2-month-old mTmG mouse liver using the standard two-step collagenase perfusion method ... Cells were filtered by a 70-μm filter and used directly as unfractionated WLCs, or centrifugated at 50 g for 5 min to pellet HCs.
incorrect.source_loc: Methods / Primary mouse liver cell isolation

incorrect.source_says: 1% (Matrigel in spheroid medium; 1% growth factor-reduced Matrigel in cholangiocyte medium)
incorrect.evidence_quote: 50% mouse HepatiCult™ Organoid Growth Medium (STEMCELL Technologies), 50% cholangiocyte organoid culture medium reported previously ( Hu et al., 2018 ) and 1% Matrigel.
incorrect.source_loc: Methods / Mouse hepatic spheroid and organoid culture

recall_misses.item: HepatiCult Organoid Growth Medium (50% of final spheroid medium)
recall_misses.source_says: The actual culture medium for all spheroids was a 1:1 mix of HepatiCult Organoid Growth Medium and the cholangiocyte organoid medium; extraction captured only the cholangiocyte-medium half and omitted HepatiCult entirely, so the recorded base_media/supplements describe only half of the true formulation.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: The same culture medium was used for all spheroid cultures: 50% mouse HepatiCult™ Organoid Growth Medium (STEMCELL Technologies), 50% cholangiocyte organoid culture medium reported previously ( Hu et al., 2018 ) and 1% Matrigel.
recall_misses.source_loc: Methods / Mouse hepatic spheroid and organoid culture

recall_misses.source_says: A major medium component (Wnt3a/R-spondin/Noggin source) supplementing the advanced DMEM/F12 base.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: supplementing advanced DMEM/F12 (Thermo Fisher Scientific) with 50% conditioned medium from L-WRN cells (CRL-3276™, American Type Culture Collection, Manassas, VA, USA)
recall_misses.source_loc: Methods / Mouse hepatic spheroid and organoid culture

recall_misses.source_says: Buffering supplement in the cholangiocyte organoid medium, not extracted.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 10 mM HEPES, 1% GlutaMax (Thermo Fisher Scientific), 1% penicillin–streptomycin
recall_misses.source_loc: Methods / Mouse hepatic spheroid and organoid culture

recall_misses.item: Supplement concentrations: B27 2%, N2 1%, GlutaMax 1%, penicillin-streptomycin 1%
recall_misses.source_says: Concentrations are stated verbatim but extraction recorded these supplements with concentration=null.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 2% B27 (Thermo Fisher Scientific), 1% N2 (Thermo Fisher Scientific) ... 1% GlutaMax (Thermo Fisher Scientific), 1% penicillin–streptomycin
recall_misses.source_loc: Methods / Mouse hepatic spheroid and organoid culture

recall_misses.item: Timeline: 7-day spheroid culture (PPTR tumor 2 days; co-culture 7 days)
recall_misses.source_says: Explicit culture durations stated; extraction timeline is empty.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: WLCs, HCs and NPCs were seeded in 24-well AW400 culture plates ... for 7 days according to the manufacturer's instructions. PPTR tumor cells were seeded at 125 cells/microwell in AW400 plates and cultured for 2 days.
recall_misses.source_loc: Methods / Mouse hepatic spheroid and organoid culture

recall_misses.item: Culture conditions: continuous shaking at 80 rpm; 40°C digestion
recall_misses.source_says: Culture/agitation condition stated; culture_conditions left not_extracted (no temp/CO2/O2 reported in source for the culture itself, but shaking condition is reported and missed).
recall_misses.evidence_quote: All cultures were kept under continuous shaking at 80 rpm on a CO 2 -resistant orbital shaker (Thermo Fisher Scientific).

notes: Text-only paper: source bundle has tables=[] and no figure images on disk, so multimodal=false. The 10 signaling factors and their concentrations were extracted verbatim and correctly (CHIR99021 3 uM, NAC 1.25 mM, nicotinamide 10 mM, gastrin 10 nM, EGF/FGF7/FGF10 50 ng/ml, HGF 25 ng/ml, A83-01 1 uM, Y-27632 10 uM); base media (Advanced DMEM/F12), matrix name (Matrigel), species (mouse), and 6 assay endpoints all correct. No fabrications or cross-protocol contamination detected; every extracted signaling factor matches the source string exactly. Main weaknesses: (1) cell_type mislabeled as adult_stem_cell when the source uses freshly isolated PRIMARY liver cells (WLC/HC/NPC) — no ASC/iPSC/ESC involved; (2) the medium is a 50:50 blend of HepatiCult Organoid Growth Medium + cholangiocyte organoid medium, and the entire HepatiCult half plus the 50% L-WRN conditioned medium and 10 mM HEPES were missed, so the captured formulation represents only part of the true medium; (3) Matrigel percent (1%) missed; (4) timeline (7-day culture) and shaking condition (80 rpm) missed. organoid_type 'liver' (pred) vs 'cholangiocyte' (bundle): defensible either way since cultures are hepatic spheroids grown in cholangiocyte medium; not counted as incorrect.
